nasb.text: The Lord your God will inflict all these curses on your enemies and on those who hate you, who persecuted you.

esv.text: And the Lord your God will put all these curses on your foes and enemies who persecuted you.

cnv.text: 耶和華你的　神必把這一切咒詛，加在你的仇敵和恨惡你、逼迫你的人身上。

ccb.text: 你们的上帝耶和华要把所有的咒诅加在你们的仇敌及憎恶你们、迫害你们的人身上。
